title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 30 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 30 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 30 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 30/10/2023
DCE iron ore futures continued to rose in a day by 2.51%. the main contract I2401 closed 900.some traders were active to sell, Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchased on demand. today's overall market transaction atmosphere in general.
